title: Future of Marketing Briefing: OpenAI is working with Skai to bring retail and commerce advertisers into ChatGPT
description: Like the Criteo deal before it, the idea is to give advertisers a route into ChatGPT inventory through infrastructure they already use.
title_en: OpenAI Partners with Skai to Bring Retail Advertisers into ChatGPT Ecosystem
summary_ko: OpenAI가 광고 플랫폼 Skai와 파트너십을 맺어 소매 및 상거래 광고주들이 ChatGPT 인벤토리에 접근할 수 있도록 하고 있다. 이전 Criteo 협업과 마찬가지로 광고주들이 이미 사용하고 있는 인프라를 통해 ChatGPT에 진입할 수 있는 경로를 제공하는 것이 목표다. AI 플랫폼이 디지털 광고 생태계의 새로운 인벤토리로 부상하고 있다.
summary_en: OpenAI is partnering with ad platform Skai to enable retail and commerce advertisers to access ChatGPT inventory. Similar to the previous Criteo deal, the goal is to provide advertisers with a pathway into ChatGPT through infrastructure they already use. AI platforms are emerging as new inventory sources in the digital advertising ecosystem.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들이 ChatGPT와 같은 AI 플랫폼을 새로운 고객 접점으로 활용할 수 있는 기회가 확대되고 있어, 기존 광고 인프라를 통한 AI 마케팅 진입 전략을 고려해야 한다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should consider AI marketing entry strategies through existing ad infrastructure as opportunities expand to leverage AI platforms like ChatGPT as new customer touchpoints.
key_points: OpenAI-Skai partnership enables retail advertisers to access ChatGPT inventory
Follows similar integration pattern as previous Criteo collaboration
Provides familiar infrastructure pathway for advertisers entering AI platforms
Represents expansion of AI platforms into advertising inventory
one_line_insight_ko: AI 플랫폼이 새로운 광고 인벤토리로 부상하며 D2C 브랜드의 고객 접점 다각화 기회를 제공한다.
one_line_insight_en: AI platforms are emerging as new advertising inventory, providing D2C brands with opportunities to diversify customer touchpoints.

title: How Content Marketers Misuse GenAI
description:
The marketers who benefit most from generative AI will likely not produce more content but will instead exercise discretion.
The post How Content Marketers Misuse GenAI appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
title_en: Content Marketers Need Strategic Discretion, Not More GenAI Output
summary_ko: 콘텐츠 마케터들이 생성형 AI를 잘못 활용하는 경우가 많다는 지적이 나오고 있다. 생성형 AI로 가장 큰 혜택을 보는 마케터들은 더 많은 콘텐츠를 생산하는 대신 신중한 판단력을 발휘한다. 양보다는 질적 접근이 생성형 AI 활용의 핵심이다.
summary_en: Content marketers are frequently misusing generative AI according to recent analysis. The marketers who benefit most from generative AI don't produce more content but instead exercise strategic discretion. Quality over quantity represents the key to effective generative AI utilization.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 생성형 AI를 단순한 콘텐츠 대량 생산 도구로 보지 말고, 전략적 콘텐츠 기획과 품질 향상을 위한 도구로 활용해야 한다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should view generative AI not as a mass content production tool, but as a strategic planning and quality enhancement instrument.
key_points: Many content marketers are misusing generative AI capabilities
Successful marketers focus on discretion rather than volume
Quality-focused approach yields better results than quantity-driven production
Strategic thinking remains crucial in AI-assisted content creation
one_line_insight_ko: 생성형 AI의 진정한 가치는 콘텐츠 양 증가가 아닌 전략적 판단력 향상에 있다.
one_line_insight_en: The true value of generative AI lies not in content volume increase but in enhancing strategic judgment.

title: As Target, Walmart and Aldi embrace naturally-colored food, brands rush to meet demand
description: Major retailers like Walmart and Target are removing artificial food dyes from their aisles, especially in products like cereals and frozen treats. This has been a boon for startups already carrying naturally-colored products in their respective categories.
title_en: Major Retailers Drive Natural Food Coloring Trend as Brands Rush to Adapt
summary_ko: Target, Walmart, Aldi와 같은 주요 소매업체들이 자연 색소를 사용한 식품을 적극 도입하고 있다. 이들 업체는 시리얼과 냉동 디저트 등에서 인공 식품 색소를 제거하고 있으며, 이는 자연 색소 제품을 이미 보유한 스타트업들에게 기회가 되고 있다. 대형 리테일러들의 정책 변화가 시장 전체의 트렌드를 주도하고 있다.
summary_en: Major retailers like Target, Walmart, and Aldi are actively embracing naturally-colored food products. These companies are removing artificial food dyes from products like cereals and frozen treats, creating opportunities for startups already carrying naturally-colored alternatives. Policy changes by major retailers are driving industry-wide trends.
so_what_ko: D2C 식품 브랜드는 자연 원료 기반 제품 개발에 집중하고, 주요 리테일러들의 정책 변화를 기회로 활용해 유통 채널 확대를 추진해야 한다.
so_what_en: D2C food brands should focus on natural ingredient-based product development and leverage major retailers' policy shifts to expand distribution channels.
key_points: Target, Walmart, and Aldi removing artificial dyes from food products
Focus on cereals and frozen treats categories
Opportunity for startups with naturally-colored product lines
Major retailer policies driving industry-wide transformation
one_line_insight_ko: 대형 리테일러의 자연 원료 정책이 D2C 식품 브랜드의 유통 확대 기회를 창출하고 있다.
one_line_insight_en: Major retailers' natural ingredient policies are creating distribution expansion opportunities for D2C food brands.

title: Dick’s Sporting Goods brings sales growth back to Foot Locker in Q1
description:
Dick’s Sporting Goods said its newly acquired Foot Locker business returned to comparable sales growth and profitability in Q1 — a sign that the retailer’s turnaround efforts are starting to take hold. For its fiscal quarter ended May 2, Dick’s reported a 6.0% increase in comparable sales for its namesake banner. During the same period, […]
The post Dick’s Sporting Goods brings sales growth back to Foot Locker in Q1 appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Dick's Sporting Goods Foot Locker Acquisition Shows Q1 Turnaround Success
summary_ko: Dick's Sporting Goods가 인수한 Foot Locker 사업이 1분기에 매출 성장과 수익성을 회복했다고 발표했다. 이는 소매업체의 턴어라운드 노력이 효과를 보이기 시작한다는 신호다. Dick's의 자사 브랜드는 1분기 동안 6.0%의 동일매장 매출 증가를 기록했다.
summary_en: Dick's Sporting Goods reported that its newly acquired Foot Locker business returned to comparable sales growth and profitability in Q1. This signals that the retailer's turnaround efforts are beginning to show results. Dick's namesake banner achieved 6.0% comparable sales growth during the first quarter.
so_what_ko: 성공적인 M&A 통합과 턴어라운드 전략이 스포츠 리테일 분야에서 실질적 성과를 보여주고 있어, D2C 브랜드의 채널 파트너십 전략 수립에 참고할 수 있다.
so_what_en: Successful M&A integration and turnaround strategies in sports retail demonstrate practical results, providing insights for D2C brands' channel partnership strategies.
key_points: Foot Locker returns to sales growth under Dick's ownership
6.0% comparable sales increase for Dick's namesake banner
Turnaround efforts showing measurable results in Q1
Demonstrates successful retail acquisition integration
one_line_insight_ko: 스포츠 리테일 분야의 성공적인 M&A 통합이 업계 재편의 새로운 모델을 제시하고 있다.
one_line_insight_en: Successful M&A integration in sports retail presents a new model for industry transformation.

title: Ecommerce Trends: Which retailers could lower prices after tariff refunds
description:
Throughout 2025 and 2026, retailers have adjusted projections, supply chain strategies and pricing as tariffs fluctuated — and now, as some of the biggest names in online retail pursue tariff refunds, some merchants are considering lower prices as a next step. What is already clear is that tariff refunds are beginning to flow in the […]
The post Ecommerce Trends: Which retailers could lower prices after tariff refunds appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Retailers Consider Price Reductions Following Tariff Refund Opportunities
summary_ko: 2025년과 2026년 동안 소매업체들은 관세 변동에 따라 예측, 공급망 전략, 가격책정을 조정해왔다. 현재 온라인 소매의 주요 업체들이 관세 환급을 추진하면서 일부 상인들은 가격 인하를 다음 단계로 고려하고 있다. 관세 환급이 이미 시작되고 있는 상황이다.
summary_en: Throughout 2025 and 2026, retailers have adjusted projections, supply chain strategies and pricing as tariffs fluctuated. Now, as major online retail names pursue tariff refunds, some merchants are considering price reductions as their next step. Tariff refunds are already beginning to flow.
so_what_ko: 관세 환급으로 인한 비용 절감 효과를 고객 가격 인하로 전환하는 전략을 고려하여 D2C 브랜드의 가격 경쟁력을 강화할 기회를 활용해야 한다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should leverage opportunities to enhance price competitiveness by considering strategies that convert cost savings from tariff refunds into customer price reductions.
key_points: Retailers adjusted strategies throughout 2025-2026 due to tariff fluctuations
Major online retailers pursuing tariff refunds
Some merchants considering price reductions as next step
Tariff refunds already beginning to materialize
one_line_insight_ko: 관세 환급이 소매업계의 새로운 가격 경쟁 사이클을 촉발할 가능성이 높다.
one_line_insight_en: Tariff refunds are likely to trigger a new price competition cycle in the retail industry.

title: How Chipotle’s rewards relaunch extends reach of its marketing flywheel
description: Curt Garner, chief strategy and technology officer at the chain, explains how a “Summer of Extras” effort builds on and gamifies its rewards program.
title_en: Chipotle's rewards relaunch extends reach of its marketing flywheel
summary_ko: 치폴레가 보상 프로그램을 재출시하며 마케팅 플라이휠의 도달 범위를 확장했습니다. 'Summer of Extras' 캠페인을 통해 보상 프로그램을 게임화하고 있습니다. 최고 전략 기술 책임자가 이러한 노력에 대해 설명했습니다.
summary_en: Chipotle relaunched its rewards program to extend the reach of its marketing flywheel. The company is gamifying its rewards program through a 'Summer of Extras' effort. The chief strategy and technology officer explained these initiatives.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 치폴레의 게임화된 보상 프로그램 전략을 벤치마킹하여 고객 충성도와 마케팅 효율성을 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C can benchmark Chipotle's gamified rewards program strategy to enhance customer loyalty and marketing effectiveness.
key_points: Chipotle relaunched its rewards program with enhanced features
Summer of Extras campaign gamifies the loyalty experience
Marketing flywheel approach extends customer engagement reach
one_line_insight_ko: 게임화된 보상 프로그램은 마케팅 플라이휠을 통해 고객 참여를 확장하는 효과적인 전략입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Gamified rewards programs effectively extend customer engagement through marketing flywheel strategies.

title: OpenAI turns on cost-per-action ads inside ChatGPT
description: Cost-per-action (CPA) is the first real sign that the platform is now embracing performance advertising.
title_en: OpenAI turns on cost-per-action ads inside ChatGPT
summary_ko: OpenAI가 ChatGPT 내에서 성과 기반 CPA 광고를 도입했습니다. 이는 플랫폼이 성과 광고를 본격 수용한다는 첫 번째 실질적 신호입니다. ChatGPT의 광고 모델이 전통적인 디스플레이 광고에서 성과 중심으로 전환되고 있습니다.
summary_en: OpenAI introduced cost-per-action advertising inside ChatGPT. This represents the first real sign that the platform is embracing performance advertising. ChatGPT's advertising model is shifting from traditional display ads to performance-based approaches.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 ChatGPT의 CPA 광고를 활용하여 AI 네이티브 환경에서 성과 기반 마케팅 전략을 개발해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should leverage ChatGPT's CPA advertising to develop performance-based marketing strategies in AI-native environments.
key_points: OpenAI launched cost-per-action advertising within ChatGPT
Marks platform's shift toward performance advertising
Creates new opportunities for AI-native marketing campaigns
one_line_insight_ko: ChatGPT의 CPA 광고 도입은 AI 네이티브 성과 마케팅 시대의 시작을 알립니다.
one_line_insight_en: ChatGPT's CPA advertising launch signals the beginning of the AI-native performance marketing era.

title: AI is not the skill email marketers need most
description:
The most valuable email marketers know how to apply AI across automation, personalization, analytics, testing, and customer journeys.
The post AI is not the skill email marketers need most appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: AI is not the skill email marketers need most
summary_ko: 이메일 마케터에게 가장 중요한 스킬은 AI 자체가 아닙니다. 가장 가치 있는 이메일 마케터는 자동화, 개인화, 분석, 테스트, 고객 여정에 걸쳐 AI를 적용하는 방법을 알고 있습니다. AI 기술보다는 AI를 전략적으로 활용하는 능력이 핵심입니다.
summary_en: AI itself is not the most important skill email marketers need. The most valuable email marketers know how to apply AI across automation, personalization, analytics, testing, and customer journeys. Strategic AI application skills are more important than technical AI knowledge.
so_what_ko: LG D2C 마케터들은 AI 기술 자체보다는 이메일 마케팅 전반에서 AI를 전략적으로 활용하는 역량 개발에 집중해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C marketers should focus on developing strategic AI application capabilities across email marketing rather than technical AI skills.
key_points: AI technical skills are less important than strategic application
Valuable marketers apply AI across automation, personalization, and analytics
Customer journey optimization with AI is the key differentiator
one_line_insight_ko: AI 기술보다는 마케팅 전략에 AI를 효과적으로 적용하는 능력이 더 중요합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Strategic AI application in marketing strategy is more valuable than technical AI skills.

title: AI agents are exposing martech’s weak point
description:
A new API report card reveals major gaps in the systems marketers depend on for automation and AI workflows.
The post AI agents are exposing martech’s weak point appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: AI agents are exposing martech's weak point
summary_ko: AI 에이전트가 마케팅 기술의 약점을 노출시키고 있습니다. 새로운 API 리포트에 따르면 마케터들이 자동화와 AI 워크플로우를 위해 의존하는 시스템에 주요 격차가 있습니다. 마케팅 기술 스택의 통합과 호환성 문제가 드러나고 있습니다.
summary_en: AI agents are exposing weak points in marketing technology. A new API report reveals major gaps in systems that marketers depend on for automation and AI workflows. Integration and compatibility issues in martech stacks are becoming apparent.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 AI 에이전트 도입 전에 마케팅 기술 스택의 API 호환성과 통합 능력을 점검하고 보완해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C must assess and improve API compatibility and integration capabilities in their martech stack before implementing AI agents.
key_points: AI agents reveal gaps in martech system integration
API compatibility issues hinder automation workflows
Martech infrastructure needs strengthening for AI adoption
one_line_insight_ko: AI 에이전트는 기존 마케팅 기술 스택의 통합 약점을 드러내는 리트머스 테스트입니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI agents serve as a litmus test exposing integration weaknesses in existing martech stacks.

title: 3 things you must know to get AI-native advertising right
description:
Conversational AI is reshaping advertising through real-time recommendations, dynamic creative, and autonomous optimization.
The post 3 things you must know to get AI-native advertising right appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: 3 things you must know to get AI-native advertising right
summary_ko: AI 네이티브 광고를 제대로 구현하기 위해 알아야 할 3가지 요소가 있습니다. 대화형 AI는 실시간 추천, 동적 크리에이티브, 자율 최적화를 통해 광고를 재편하고 있습니다. AI 네이티브 광고의 핵심 성공 요소들이 제시되었습니다.
summary_en: There are three essential elements to know for implementing AI-native advertising correctly. Conversational AI is reshaping advertising through real-time recommendations, dynamic creative, and autonomous optimization. Key success factors for AI-native advertising have been identified.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 실시간 추천, 동적 크리에이티브, 자율 최적화 기능을 갖춘 AI 네이티브 광고 전략을 개발해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should develop AI-native advertising strategies featuring real-time recommendations, dynamic creative, and autonomous optimization.
key_points: Real-time recommendations enhance advertising relevance
Dynamic creative adapts to user interactions automatically
Autonomous optimization improves campaign performance continuously
one_line_insight_ko: AI 네이티브 광고는 실시간성, 동적 적응성, 자율성을 통해 전통적 광고 패러다임을 변화시킵니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI-native advertising transforms traditional advertising paradigms through real-time responsiveness, dynamic adaptability, and autonomy.

title: Marketplace Briefing: Why Amazon is selling its AI-powered shopping tools to other retailers
description: Amazon is starting to sell the technology behind its AI shopping assistant to other retailers, as the e-commerce giant looks to become a bigger player in the fast-growing market for AI-powered shopping tools.
title_en: Amazon Sells AI Shopping Assistant Technology to Competing Retailers
summary_ko: 아마존이 자체 AI 쇼핑 어시스턴트 기술을 다른 리테일러들에게 판매하기 시작했습니다. 이는 아마존이 급성장하는 AI 기반 쇼핑 도구 시장에서 더 큰 플레이어가 되려는 전략의 일환입니다. 이커머스 거대 기업이 경쟁사들에게도 자신의 기술을 제공하는 새로운 비즈니스 모델을 선보이고 있습니다.
summary_en: Amazon has begun selling the technology behind its AI shopping assistant to other retailers. This move represents Amazon's strategy to become a bigger player in the fast-growing AI-powered shopping tools market. The e-commerce giant is now offering its proprietary technology to competitors as a new business model.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 아마존의 AI 쇼핑 기술을 활용하거나 자체 AI 쇼핑 어시스턴트 개발을 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should evaluate leveraging Amazon's AI shopping technology or developing proprietary AI shopping assistants to remain competitive.
key_points: Amazon monetizing AI shopping technology as B2B service
Growing market for AI-powered shopping tools
New revenue stream from selling tech to competitors
one_line_insight_ko: 아마존이 AI 쇼핑 기술을 경쟁사에게 판매하며 새로운 B2B 수익 모델을 창출하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Amazon is creating new B2B revenue streams by selling AI shopping technology to competitors.

title: How GenAI Platforms Produce Answers
description:
A useful first step toward genAI visibility is understanding the answer-creation process. 
The post How GenAI Platforms Produce Answers appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
title_en: Understanding How GenAI Platforms Generate Ecommerce Answers
summary_ko: 생성형 AI 플랫폼의 답변 생성 과정을 이해하는 것이 AI 가시성 확보의 중요한 첫 단계입니다. 이커머스에서 GenAI가 어떻게 답변을 만들어내는지 파악하는 것이 필요합니다. AI 답변 생성 메커니즘에 대한 이해가 비즈니스 활용도를 높일 수 있습니다.
summary_en: Understanding the answer-creation process is a useful first step toward achieving GenAI visibility in ecommerce. The article explains how GenAI platforms generate responses for business applications. Comprehending AI answer generation mechanisms can improve business utilization effectiveness.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 GenAI 답변 생성 과정을 이해하여 고객 서비스와 제품 추천 시스템을 개선할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C can improve customer service and product recommendation systems by understanding GenAI answer generation processes.
key_points: GenAI answer creation process crucial for visibility
Understanding mechanisms improves business applications
First step toward effective AI implementation
one_line_insight_ko: GenAI 답변 생성 과정 이해가 이커머스 AI 활용의 기초가 됩니다.
one_line_insight_en: Understanding GenAI answer generation processes forms the foundation for ecommerce AI utilization.

title: How to optimize for AI overviews (AIOs): A complete 2026 playbook
description: Google AI Overviews appear in Google Search results for a growing share of queries, and if your content isn’t structured to earn a citation, you’re losing visibility to competitors who’ve already adapted. Unfortunately, the challenge isn’t awareness. Most SEO leaders know AI Overviews exist. The challenge is execution: translating Google’s deliberately vague guidance into repeatable content workflows, measuring whether your AI website optimizations are actually earning citations, and proving business impact when traditional metrics like rank position and CTR no longer tell the full story. This playbook closes that gap.
title_en: Complete 2026 Playbook for Optimizing Content for Google AI Overviews
summary_ko: 구글 AI 오버뷰가 점점 더 많은 검색 결과에 나타나고 있어, 콘텐츠 최적화가 필수가 되었습니다. AI 오버뷰에 인용되지 않으면 이미 적응한 경쟁사들에게 가시성을 잃게 됩니다. 이 플레이북은 구글의 모호한 가이드라인을 실행 가능한 콘텐츠 워크플로로 전환하는 방법을 제시합니다.
summary_en: Google AI Overviews appear in search results for a growing share of queries, making content optimization essential. Without earning citations in AI Overviews, brands lose visibility to competitors who have adapted. This playbook translates Google's vague guidance into actionable content workflows and measurement strategies.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 AI 오버뷰 최적화를 통해 검색 가시성을 확보하고 콘텐츠 전략을 재정비해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C must secure search visibility through AI Overview optimization and restructure content strategy accordingly.
key_points: AI Overviews growing in Google search results
Content structure critical for earning citations
Traditional SEO metrics no longer sufficient
one_line_insight_ko: AI 오버뷰 최적화가 2026년 검색 마케팅의 핵심 전략이 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI Overview optimization is becoming the core strategy for search marketing in 2026.

title: We Debunk 5 Misconceptions About Email Marketing
description: No, email is not perfect, but many of its challenges are solvable if you go about it the right way. Here's how.
title_en: Debunking Five Common Email Marketing Misconceptions
summary_ko: 이메일 마케팅에 대한 5가지 오해를 해소하는 내용입니다. 이메일이 완벽하지는 않지만 올바른 방법으로 접근하면 많은 문제들이 해결 가능합니다. 잘못된 인식들을 바로잡아 이메일 마케팅의 효과를 극대화할 수 있습니다.
summary_en: The article addresses five common misconceptions about email marketing. While email is not perfect, many challenges are solvable with the right approach. Correcting misperceptions can help maximize email marketing effectiveness.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 이메일 마케팅 오해를 바로잡고 AI 기반 개인화 전략을 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C should correct email marketing misconceptions and strengthen AI-powered personalization strategies.
key_points: Five misconceptions about email marketing addressed
Email challenges are solvable with proper approach
Correcting perceptions improves effectiveness
one_line_insight_ko: 올바른 접근 방식으로 이메일 마케팅의 근본적 문제들을 해결할 수 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Fundamental email marketing challenges can be solved with the right approach.

title: #213: AI Answers - What AI Should Never Do, Enterprise Scaling, Governing AI & Navigating IT Roadblocks
description:
Leadership wants AI everywhere. IT security can't keep up. Marketing is racing ahead while legal and finance dig in. And every week brings another story of an AI agent doing something nobody told it to do. Paul Roetzer and Cathy McPhillips answer 15 listener questions on how to actually move organizations forward and where the real opportunities lie for individuals, SMBs, and enterprises right now.

00:00:00 — Intro

00:07:01 — How do you move a company out of AI policy paralysis?

00:08:54 — How should regulated, hands-on teams introduce AI?

00:12:30 — When companies are stuck, what tends to get them moving?

00:15:00 — Should IT security evolve to adopt AI quicker or should businesses slow down?

00:17:43 — What changes an AI-skeptic employee's mind?

00:21:18 — How should early-career professionals prioritize what to learn?

00:23:29 — Is there a point where you should stop learning and start building?

00:27:29 — Where do companies get stuck scaling AI across departments?

00:29:4
title_en: AI Implementation Challenges: Enterprise Scaling and IT Security Roadblocks
summary_ko: 리더십은 AI를 모든 곳에 도입하려 하지만 IT 보안이 따라가지 못하고 있습니다. 마케팅은 빠르게 앞서가는 반면 법무와 재무 부서는 신중한 접근을 취하고 있습니다. AI 에이전트가 예상치 못한 행동을 하는 사례들이 매주 보고되고 있어 조직의 AI 도입에 난항이 예상됩니다.
summary_en: Leadership wants AI everywhere but IT security cannot keep pace with implementation demands. Marketing is racing ahead while legal and finance departments remain cautious. Weekly reports of AI agents performing unexpected actions highlight organizational challenges in AI adoption.
so_what_ko: LG D2C는 부서 간 AI 도입 속도 차이를 조율하고 체계적인 AI 거버넌스 프레임워크를 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: LG D2C must coordinate departmental AI adoption pace differences and establish systematic AI governance frameworks.
key_points: Misaligned AI adoption pace across departments
IT security struggling to keep up with AI implementation
Weekly AI agent incidents highlight governance needs
one_line_insight_ko: 기업 AI 도입에서 부서 간 속도 차이와 거버넌스 부재가 주요 걸림돌입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Departmental pace misalignment and governance gaps are major barriers to enterprise AI adoption.
